villain_for_copy.primary_villain: The 'prompt-and-pray' approach that the entire market is stuck in — leading to an ocean of identical AI slop
villain_for_copy.secondary_villain: AI tool companies that promise 'human-quality' output but deliver the same generic result everyone else gets
villain_for_copy.tertiary_villain: AI humanizers that treat the symptom (detection) instead of the disease (quality)
